text:
聞いていたとおり
手ごわいエネミーだったが
有意なデータを得ることが出来た。

実りのある特訓となって何よりだ。
だからお前との共闘は面白い。

それでは、ここを離れるとしよう。
後で、私のもとに報告に来てほ

The enemies were as formidable as I had
heard, but we were able to obtain valuable
data nonetheless.

What's most important is that our training
was beneficial to us. That's why teaming
up with you is so advantageous.
Now, let's leave this place. Report to me later.
